inline_comments.message:
This breaks all java jobs that do not have docker credentials configured (which is quite a few, based on the number of reported merge failures). If you need a docker-compatible java merge job, I think it may be better to add a new job under a different name.

Jessica, since you're the most familiar with ONAP, could you provide some input?

This change should have not gotten merged without proper testing!
This caused many jobs to fail today
Please revert it and lets merge it only after we know what issues can the changes could cause

The docker login part cannot be fully tested in Sandbox because it lacks credentials to login to dockerhub. I am sorry for the disruption. Let's sync on what the best method to implement and test this functionality would be.
